jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>From Fivetran’s founding until now, our mission has remained the same: to make access to data as simple and reliable as electricity. With Fivetran, customer data arrives in their warehouses, canonicalised and ready for analysis.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Senior Software Engineer partners with Engineering & Product to ship the data-pipeline core that powers Fivetran’s ELT platform.</p>

jobs.title: Account Executive
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>From Fivetran’s founding until now, our mission has remained the same: to make access to data as simple and reliable as electricity. The Sales team owns the B2B Fivetran enterprise-replication pipeline.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Account Executive partners with Sales Engineering and Customer Success to grow the Fivetran HVR enterprise-replication footprint across Fortune 1000 cohorts.</p>
